content: With the fiscal year winding down, we are starting to make budget plans for the 2018-2019 season. Here are a few of the suggestions floating around for some medium-large ticket items. Please re-order them by dragging the different options around with your most desired additions on top, and least important ones on the bottom. Also, if you have some other suggestions please let us know in the “other improvements” section below, or drop a note in the comments.
